confidentiality_rules: Source fidelity: only include skills, tools, and experiences that exist in the candidate's source material — this is the single most important rule and constitutes resume fraud if violated
jd_mirroring_rules: Extract the top 5–7 keywords/themes from the JD and ensure each appears at least once
anti_patterns: Fabricating skills or tools to match the JD… this is the single most important rule and constitutes resume fraud
Inventing achievements or metrics not present in the source material
Changing dates, titles, or companies to better align with the job requirements
Adding certifications or education not actually obtained
Exaggerating scope or impact beyond what the source material supports
Copying language directly from the JD without grounding it in real experience
brand_guidelines: Professional, concise, and achievement-focused. Use strong action verbs and quantified impact where available.

typography_rules.fonts: Use clean, professional fonts (e.g., Arial, Calibri, Helvetica)
typography_rules.headings: Clear hierarchy with bold section headers
